mapper.select: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_user WHERE del_flag = '0') AS totalNum, (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT login_name) FROM sys_user_online) AS onlineNum, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_user WHERE del_flag = '0' AND status = '1') AS lockNum
SELECT temperature, humidity, pressure FROM bigscreen_metric_snapshot WHERE scope_type = 'GLOBAL' AND scope_key = 'ALL' ORDER BY snapshot_time DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT AVG(dr.current_temp) AS temperature, AVG(dr.current_humi) AS humidity, AVG(dr.current_pres) AS pressure FROM device_runtime_status dr INNER JOIN device_info di ON di.device_no = dr.device_no AND di.is_enabled = 1

SELECT CASE WHEN di.gatewayno REGEXP '^[0-9]+$' THEN CAST(di.gatewayno AS UNSIGNED) ELSE 0 END AS gatewayno, di.device_no AS deviceId, IFNULL(del.online_state, IF(dr.run_status = 1, 1, 0)) AS onlineState, DATE_FORMAT(IFNULL(del.event_time, dr.last_update_time), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS createTime, IFNULL(si.province, '') AS provinceName, IFNULL(si.city, '') AS cityName, IFNULL(si.county, '') AS countyName FROM device_event_log del INNER JOIN device_info di ON di.device_no = del.device_no LEFT JOIN station_info si ON si.id = di.station_id LEFT JOIN device_runtime_status dr ON dr.device_no = di.device_no ORDER BY del.event_time DESC LIMIT #{limitNum}

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(alarm_time, '%Y-%m') AS ym, SUM(CASE WHEN IFNULL(alarm_level, 9) <= 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS lowCnt, SUM(CASE WHEN IFNULL(alarm_level, 9) > 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS highCnt FROM rules_alarm_log WHERE alarm_time >= DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{months} MONTH), '%Y-%m-01') GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(alarm_time, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY ym ASC

SELECT CASE WHEN di.gatewayno REGEXP '^[0-9]+$' THEN CAST(di.gatewayno AS UNSIGNED) ELSE 0 END AS gatewayno, CASE WHEN di.terminalno REGEXP '^[0-9]+$' THEN CAST(di.terminalno AS UNSIGNED) ELSE 0 END AS terminalno, r.alarm_name AS alertname, r.alarm_value AS alertvalue, r.alarm_detail AS alertdetail, IFNULL(r.phase, '') AS phase, IFNULL(r.sb_info, '') AS sbInfo, DATE_FORMAT(r.alarm_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS createtime, IFNULL(si.province, '') AS provinceName, IFNULL(si.city, '') AS cityName, IFNULL(si.county, '') AS countyName, CAST(NULL AS CHAR) AS deviceid FROM rules_alarm_log r INNER JOIN device_info di ON di.device_no = r.device_no LEFT JOIN station_info si ON si.id = r.station_id ORDER BY r.alarm_time DESC LIMIT #{limitNum}
SELECT id FROM station_info WHERE station_no = #{stationNo} LIMIT 1

SELECT tn.node_id AS id, tn.node_name AS name, tn.node_type AS type, si.station_no AS stationNo, CASE WHEN tn.node_type = 'SITE' THEN si.station_no ELSE SUBSTRING_INDEX(tn.node_id, ':', -1) END AS deviceNo, CASE WHEN tn.device_no IS NULL THEN 'ONLINE' WHEN IFNULL(dr.run_status, 2) = 1 THEN 'ONLINE' ELSE 'OFFLINE' END AS status FROM topology_node tn INNER JOIN station_info si ON si.id = tn.station_id LEFT JOIN device_runtime_status dr ON dr.device_no = tn.device_no WHERE si.station_no = #{stationNo} ORDER BY tn.sort_no ASC, tn.id ASC
SELECT source_node_id AS source, target_node_id AS target, link_type AS linkType, IFNULL(label, '') AS label FROM topology_link WHERE station_id = #{stationId} AND is_enabled = 1 ORDER BY id ASC

SELECT IFNULL(si.city, si.station_name) AS name, COUNT(*) AS value FROM rules_alarm_log r LEFT JOIN station_info si ON si.id = r.station_id GROUP BY IFNULL(si.city, si.station_name) ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT #{limitNum}

SELECT IFNULL(si.province, si.region_name) AS name, COUNT(DISTINCT di.id) AS value FROM station_info si LEFT JOIN device_info di ON di.station_id = si.id AND di.is_enabled = 1 WHERE si.is_enabled = 1 GROUP BY IFNULL(si.province, si.region_name)

SELECT IFNULL(si.city, si.county) AS name, COUNT(DISTINCT di.id) AS value FROM station_info si LEFT JOIN device_info di ON di.station_id = si.id AND di.is_enabled = 1 WHERE si.is_enabled = 1 AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM station_info z WHERE z.region_code = #{regionCode} AND z.province = si.province ) GROUP BY IFNULL(si.city, si.county)
